title: HEARTLAND HUMANE SOCIETY - 211info
text: HEARTLAND HUMANE SHELTER AND CARE HEARTLAND HUMANE SOCIETY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides open-door admission, low-cost adoptions, Trap-Neuter-Return (TNR) for feral cats, and working cat adoptions for shelter animals. Offers lost and found pet assistance, a pet food pantry, low-cost vaccine clinics, a safe housing program for pets of people in crisis, and low-cost end-of-life services for the community. 398 SW Twin Oaks Circle Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday noon-6pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-5pm Email (541) 757-9000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (541) 757-9000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 9am-6pm Services: Animal Adoption Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Animal Shelters Foster Care/Temporary Shelter for Animals Neuter/Spay Services Pet Food Veterinary Care Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
